creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please login to bugzilla as yuri@freebsd.org and leave comment here to confirm ownership. Use your Kerberos password for authorization, see more information on how to set/reset password here: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/committers-guide/kerberos-ldap.html 

 bugmeister@ can't merge Phabricator accounts though, you'll have to contact phabricator team for this. I am not shure who's the right person for this.
